emails.subject: Petrofina Gas Pipeline Company
emails.body: Petrofina Gas Pipeline Company Dan, I need your help with this confirmation please. It is a buyback, which we currently don't confirm. However we have had a request to send a confirmation out this time and I guess going forward we should confirm these deals. We haven't got a template, but I've put something together I want you to look at and especially where it's highlighted in red, we need some legal language. Please have a look and let me know what you think or if you need more information, please contact me. Thanks Ellen x54099
